name: dev-kit-git-sync
description: Smart logical repository synchronization and atomic commits. Categorizes changes into domain-specific groups and generates high-fidelity messages.

sections.title: Categorization
bullets: Docs, AI, CLI, Core, and Misc groupings.

sections.title: Typical Workflow
bullets: Plan: Identify repository drift and task context.
Normalize: Group changes into logical commit domains.
Process: Execute atomic commits and sync state.
